name: production-release
description: Preflight + plans + monitoring -> deploy gate -> docs -> ORCHESTRATOR FREEZE (structured evidence.freeze contract) -> evidence finalizer -> OUTPUT-ONLY launch gate. Sequential room; each seat declares its real shared-memory writes. Earlier-phase artifacts it does not produce are explicit, documented assumptions.
rules: sequential stages — one seat active at a time, all shared-memory writes declared
nothing ships while /gate:before-deploy is NO-GO or /gate:production-ready is BLOCKED

EVIDENCE LIFECYCLE: specialists produce raw artifacts and N/A candidates only — NO seat writes .solo/gate-evidence/ records mid-flow. After the docs stage the ORCHESTRATOR performs the structured freeze (evidence.freeze): commits every tracked release/docs/project-memory change, verifies a clean tree, and records FINAL_SHA with the gate plugin's update_run_state.py helper in untracked .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json. The evidence_finalizer coordinator prepares and verifies the preview, then PAUSES: only the user may confirm and invoke the manual-only /gate:finalize-evidence command. The coordinator resumes only to verify all 14 records at FINAL_SHA; the gatekeeper then verifies the FULL set with check_evidence.py and remains OUTPUT-ONLY
vendor-specific checks run only for providers recorded in .solo/stack.md

assumes_preexisting..solo/prd.md: produced by the PRD phase of an earlier room/session; this room only ships
assumes_preexisting..solo/architecture.md: produced by the architecture phase of an earlier room/session
assumes_preexisting..solo/design.md: produced by the design phase of an earlier room/session
assumes_preexisting..solo/data-contract.md: produced by the contracts phase of an earlier room/session
assumes_preexisting..solo/tests.md: produced by the QA phase of an earlier room/session
assumes_preexisting..solo/bugs.md: produced by the browser-QA phase of an earlier room/session
assumes_preexisting..solo/risks.md: produced by the security phase of an earlier room/session
assumes_preexisting..solo/project.md: project profile recorded by an earlier intake session; read by the finalizer (N/A matrix) and never produced by this room
assumes_preexisting..solo/stack.md: canonical stack and connector context recorded by an earlier intake session; read by finalization and launch-gate checks
assumes_preexisting..solo/env-contract.md: produced by the contracts phase of an earlier room/session; read by the release seat
assumes_preexisting..solo/api-contract.md: produced by the contracts phase of an earlier room/session; read by the docs seat

seats.agent_note: one seat covers the DevOps and Release Manager duties in this compact room
seats.deliverable: Preflight + deploy/rollback plans in release.md, monitoring recorded, before-deploy gate GO — raw artifacts only; NO gate-evidence records (the user-invoked finalization command creates all 14 at FINAL_SHA while the coordinator only verifies)

Docs + release notes matched to what ships (runs AFTER release.md exists); completion noted in the handoff — raw artifacts only; no gate-evidence record (all records are minted later by the evidence finalizer, never by this seat)

seats.agent_note: coordination-only seat: prepares and verifies the preview, pauses for the user to invoke the manual-only command, then verifies the resulting records; it never invokes /gate:finalize-evidence itself

human_handoff.resume_on: the user reports successful command completion and the coordinator verifies all 14 records at FINAL_SHA

seats.deliverable: Reads FINAL_SHA from untracked .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json, verifies HEAD equals it, and prepares the exact user handoff inputs; pauses while the user invokes /gate:finalize-evidence, reviews the command-generated preview, and explicitly confirms execution, then verifies all 14 resulting records and hands off only on success; the coordinator never invokes the manual-only command or changes tracked files

OUTPUT-ONLY after finalization: verifies HEAD equals FINAL_SHA from untracked .solo/run-state/<run_id>.json, runs check_evidence.py (self-derived HEAD), issues the verdict in output — zero tracked writes

exit_criteria: check_evidence.py exits 0 at the current commit + environment and the production-ready gate returns SAFE TO LAUNCH (or SAFE WITH WARNINGS explicitly accepted); handoff saved

freeze.commits: all tracked release/docs/project-memory changes (release.md, monitoring.md, docs/, handoff/tasks/decisions/risks) in ONE freeze commit
freeze.verifies: git status --porcelain is empty outside the untracked runtime dirs (.solo/gate-evidence/, .solo/run-state/) — a dirty tree aborts the freeze
freeze.records: FINAL_SHA of the freeze commit, recorded with update_run_state.py advance final — the helper derives it from git rev-parse HEAD itself (run-state-v1; monotonic; frozen once set)
